Class 2 or 3 armor adds zero mass to your ship.
Class 4 or 5 armor adds zero mass to your ship.
Your ship starts a new game with zero mass, and no mass is added from weapons, shields, armor, cargo pods, etc.
Start a new game with $115,536 (instead of $50,000).
Start a new game with $705,360 (instead of $50,000).
Start a new game with $2,016,080 (instead of $50,000).
All items are free (shields, armor, weapons, training, etc).
Your ship can carry up to 26 cargo pods (instead of 16).
Acceleration doesn't decrease when adding mass.
Class 1 engines (the engine you start with) has 20 acceleration instead of 4.
Your TV (Terrain Vehicle) starts with twice as much fuel (200 instead of 100).
Your TV (Terrain Vehicle) will have infinite fuel.
Your TV (Terrain Vehicle) can travel twice as fast on flat/open terrain.
Your TV (terrain Vehicle) can travel 3x as fast on flat/open terrain.
Your TV (Terrain Vehicle) can travel 3x as fast on dark green terrain.
Your TV (Terrain Vehicle) can travel 5x as fast on dark green terrain.
Your TV (Terrain Vehicle) can travel 8x as fast on mountain terrain.
Your TV (Terrain Vehicle) can travel 16x as fast on mountain terrain.
Your TV (Terrain Vehicle) can travel twice as fast on water.
Your TV (Terrain Vehicle) can travel 4x as fast on water.
You can embark from anywhere on the planet.
Your terrain vehicle can carry an infinite amount of cargo.
Start a new game with twice as much endurium (fuel).
Your TV (Terrain Vehicle) can travel 4x as fast on ice planets.
Your TV (Terrain Vehicle) can travel 8x as fast on ice planets.
Your ship has almost infinite fuel. See notes.
Your terrain vehicle has protection from most "damage".
Your ship's armor won't take damage during most enemy attacks.
Your terrain vehicle "armor" has protection from most damage.
Kill most enemies with one hit.
Firing your ship's weapons doesn't use any fuel.
